data.title: Fareportal and Amadeus deepen partnership to drive innovation in travel distribution. New agreement signed on January 21, 2026.
data.description: Today, Fareportal, a prominent travel technology company operating popular travel brands like CheapOair and OneTravel, revealed an extended long-term partnership with Amadeus, a renowned travel technology provider. The collaboration was announced in New York on January 21, 2026.

data.title: SLTC, LLC and 12 North Capital merge to form national senior living investment platform under SLTC banner.
data.description: SLTC, LLC and 12 North Capital LLC have recently confirmed plans to merge, creating a robust senior living investment platform under the name SLTC. This agreement will bring together two entities with extensive experience in senior living investment and technology-based healthcare.

data.title: New dating platform Love's Gateway launches in the Bay Area, presents intentional Heart and Gatekeeper model for singles.
data.description: A new dating platform called Love's Gateway has been launched for singles in the Bay Area. This platform aims to provide a different approach to modern dating by incorporating a unique Heart and Gatekeeper model that involves personalized human input in the matching process. Unlike traditional swipe-based apps, Love's Gateway focuses on fostering more meaningful connections between users.

data.title: Global Brokerage The Agency opens third Oregon office in Lake Oswego, expanding reach. Located in Portland's popular area. Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: A leading global brokerage, The Agency, has opened its third office in Oregon, located in Lake Oswego. This expansion marks a significant milestone for the company, expanding its presence to a key area in Portland. The new office is set to cater to the growing demand for real estate services in the region. The Agency's latest venture aligns with its strategic growth plans and underscores its commitment to serving clients effectively.

data.title: 1 in 3 VPN users aim to conceal online activity from government, per PasswordManager.com survey. #InternetPrivacy
data.description: In Seattle on January 22, 2026, PasswordManager.com released findings from a recent survey reflecting worry among VPN users about online government surveillance. The study, involving individuals from various political backgrounds, emphasizes growing concerns over privacy. The data reveals a significant increase in VPN usage, highlighting a shift towards protecting online activities. This suggests that a larger number of individuals are taking measures to shield their internet browsing from potential monitoring.

data.title: Otto Group partners with Reply and NVIDIA to develop AI-driven virtual control system for robotics, improving delivery times and service levels.
data.description: In Turin, Italy, Reply [EXM, STAR: REY] is collaborating with the global retailer Otto Group to introduce a centralized, AI-powered virtual control system for intelligent robotic orchestration. The "Robotic Coordination Layer," a result of the partnership between Otto Group, Reply, and NVIDIA, facilitates the training, simulation, and orchestration of self-governing mobile robots and stationary systems. This innovation significantly boosts delivery speed and improves service quality. The system is focused on a cutting-edge hi-tech platform.

data.title: Test of 5 AI coding platforms shows varied results for new users: Manus and Lovable excel, Cursor falls short. #AI #coding
data.description: A recent examination of five AI coding platforms found significant variations in user-friendliness for novice users, with Manus and Lovable standing out as top performers while Cursor proved to be wholly inadequate. Further details can be accessed by clicking on the provided link.

data.title: UAB AEI's NAV for December 2025 is EUR 88,775,963, a decrease from EUR 94,367,121 in September 2025.
data.description: By December 2025, the net asset value (NAV) of UAB “Atsinaujinančios energetikos investicijos” (AEI) decreased to EUR 88,775,963 from EUR 94,367,121 reported in September 2025.

data.title: David Sacks predicts banks will fully enter crypto industry, unifying digital assets sector. Stablecoin regulation debate ongoing.
data.description: David Sacks, who serves as the AI and crypto advisor for the Trump administration, has made a significant prediction regarding the future of the banking and crypto industries. He foresees that banks will increasingly participate in the crypto sector, leading to the formation of a more cohesive digital assets industry. This forecast comes at a time when progress on legislation concerning crypto market structures has hit a roadblock. The main point of contention revolves around whether third-party platforms should be permitted to provide rewards programs to users of stablecoins. Banks assert that such programs violate yield restrictions, whereas crypto companies argue that they are crucial revenue channels for decentralized finance. Sacks highlighted the need for compromise to facilitate legislative advancements during an interview with CNBC's Squawk Box. He stressed that the integration of banks into the crypto space will result in the emergence of a singular digital assets sector, rather than separate banking and crypto industries. For further details, refer to the article available on Benzinga.com.
